rules.name: unwrap_in_func
rules.message: #[func] method uses .unwrap() — will panic and crash Godot editor/runtime
rules.suggestion: Use .unwrap_or_default() or return a Result-based Variant

rules.name: stringname_alloc_in_loop
rules.message: StringName::from() allocation inside a loop — allocates on every iteration
rules.suggestion: Cache StringName as a const or lazy_static outside the loop

rules.name: gstring_alloc_in_process
rules.message: String/GString allocation in _process() — runs every frame
rules.suggestion: Cache as StringName or GString field, initialize in ready()

rules.name: thread_spawn_with_gd
rules.message: Gd<T> used in thread::spawn closure — Gd is not Send, will panic
rules.suggestion: Extract data from Gd<T> before spawning. Use channels to return results.

rules.name: dictionary_return_in_func
rules.message: #[func] returning Dictionary — each access converts Variant, consider typed struct
rules.suggestion: For bulk data transfer, use PackedByteArray (zero-copy) or a typed GodotClass

rules.name: array_dictionary_in_func
rules.message: #[func] returning Array<Dictionary> — high Variant conversion overhead for large arrays
rules.suggestion: Use PackedByteArray with MessagePack/JSON serialization for bulk entity data

rules.name: base_mut_before_super
rules.message: base_mut() called in ready() before super — may cause crash in some Godot versions
rules.suggestion: Call on_ready/super first, then use base_mut()

rules.name: gd_clone_unnecessary
rules.message: Cloning Gd<T> at end of statement — result unused, consider if clone is needed
rules.suggestion: Use &Gd<T> reference instead if ownership not needed

rules.name: missing_class_init
rules.message: GodotClass without #[class(init)] may not initialize properly in Godot editor
rules.suggestion: Add #[class(init)] if this class needs default construction from Godot editor

rules.name: var_on_large_struct
rules.message: #[var] on collection type — every Godot property access converts to Variant
rules.suggestion: Expose via #[func] methods instead of #[var] for collection types

rules.name: deprecated_bind_mut_in_signal
rules.message: bind_mut() inside signal connection may cause deadlock if signal fires during borrow
rules.suggestion: Extract the needed data before the signal handler executes

rules.name: missing_tool_for_editor_plugin
rules.message: EditorPlugin implementation without #[class(tool)] — plugin won't run in editor

rules.name: export_untyped_array
rules.message: #[export] with Array<Variant> — untyped array shows poorly in Godot editor
rules.suggestion: Use a typed Array<T> or PackedArray for better editor integration

rules.name: dictionary_get_in_loop
rules.message: Dictionary.get() inside loop — extract values before the loop
rules.suggestion: Extract dictionary values before the loop with let val = dict.get(key);

rules.name: variant_conversion_in_process
rules.message: Variant conversion in _process() — runs every frame, allocates
rules.suggestion: Cache converted values or avoid Variant in hot paths
